'''Gold 4''' was the designation of a [[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-wing]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The craft had several scars across its [[Hull/Legends|hull]] caused by small [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] impacts.<ref name="CCG-Gold4" /> Stationed at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]],<ref name="ANH" /> the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lepira/Legends|Lepira]] and assigned to [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]].<ref name="CCG-Lepira">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Lieutenant Lepira}}</ref> During the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Gold 4 was the point starfighter for Gold Squadron's approach to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="CCG-Gold4" />
